abilities.name: merciless
abilities.shortEffect: This Pokémon's moves critical hit against poisoned targets.
abilities.effect: This Pokémon's moves critical hit against poisoned targets.
abilities.flavorText: The Pokémon's attacks become critical hits if the target is poisoned.

abilities.name: limber
abilities.effect: This Pokémon cannot be paralyzed. If a Pokémon is paralyzed and acquires this ability, its paralysis is healed; this includes when regaining a lost ability upon leaving battle.
abilities.flavorText: The Pokémon's limber body prevents it from being paralyzed.

abilities.name: regenerator
abilities.shortEffect: Heals for 1/3 max HP upon switching out.
abilities.effect: This Pokémon regains 1/3 of its maximum HP when it is switched out for another Pokémon under any circumstances other than having fainted. This ability does not take effect when a battle ends.
abilities.flavorText: The Pokémon has a little of its HP restored when withdrawn from battle.
